title: draba subnivalis
intro: Draba subnivalis, also known as the Alpine Draba or White Draba, is a small, annual plant that belongs to the Mustard or Brassicaceae family. It is native to the high-altitude regions of the Himalayas and is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The plant's extracts have been traditionally used to treat various health issues, such as respiratory problems, skin conditions, and digestive issues, due to its health benefits of reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. The herbal preparations of Draba subnivalis include infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
